segments.text: The other options don't lead to a KO, but that meteor is the only one that can see a kill
segments.original_text: 他の選択肢は撃墜には至らないんですけど唯一撃墜まで見えるメテオ

segments.text: It's the difference in spacing to the KO zone around here
segments.original_text: この辺りの撃墜へのゾーンの差ですね

segments.text: Setting up a strategy against the parry
segments.original_text: ジャスガに対して対策を張るような

segments.text: This side B is probably a parry counter
segments.original_text: この横Bはおそらくジャスガ対策でしょう

segments.text: There's a decent amount of lag to parry it
segments.original_text: 結構遅れてねジャスガするためには

full_text: The other options don't lead to a KO, but that meteor is the only one that can see a kill It's the difference in spacing to the KO zone around here Fair, fair applying pressure Setting up a strategy against the parry Aerial This side B is probably a parry counter There's a decent amount of lag to parry it
